homepage.title: Rollon : guías lineales, guias telescópicas y ejes lineales
homepage.description: Como fabricante de soluciones lineales, Rollon ofrece soluciones de guías lineales de última generación, desde el componente hasta el sistema.

myRollon es la plataforma de trabajo digital de Rollon diseñada para simplificar la selección y configuración de soluciones de movimiento lineal y rotativo.
Selection Tool
Introduzca los datos de su solicitud y obtenga sus soluciones.
Configurador
Obtenga su referencia y esté listo para realizar su pedido.
Product Center
Explore todos los productos y descargue los recursos.
Account
Acceda a su área privada.

About us
Driving innovation in Linear Motion
For 50 years, Rollon has been at the forefront of the industrial motion industry, providing highly engineered linear motion components, with a special focus on tailored solutions aimed at innovating and meeting the evolving needs of the market.
Part of The Timken Company
Mission & Vision
The Group
Global Footprint
History
Portfolio
Services
Certifications
Mission & Vision
Mission
We are committed to a world where our knowledge and ethics make the world’s industries work better
Vision
To be the world’s leading linear motion provider for customized product solutions and digital services, committed to a demanding innovative and sustainable approach
The Rollon Group
Rollon designs and manufactures
linear components, actuators and systems
for industrial motion, with a special focus on
tailored solutions
. In 2018, we joined The Timken Company, becoming the flagship brand for linear motion within the Industrial Motion segment of Timken.
Since 2023, with Timken’s acquisitions of Nadella, Chiavette Unificate, Durbal, Shuton-Ipiranga and Rosa Sistemi, Rollon’s portfolio has expanded, offering new operational synergies and enhanced geographical reach.
As a result, we are now able to offer an even more comprehensive
linear
